name: Lovable Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine peanut butter and sugar in a bowl, blending well.
2. Add the beaten egg whites to the mixture, stirring thoroughly.
3. Mix in the chopped peanuts.
4. Roll the dough into walnut-sized balls.
5. Place the balls on an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Flatten each cookie with a fork.
7. Sprinkle whole peanuts over the top of each cookie.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes.
9. Allow to cool slightly before removing from the pan.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
